common.databaseExplanation: Site is based off the official records of the Estonian Volleyball Federation, but also tracks separately competitive matches and all known matches, including additional sets and non-official matches against national teams and clubs.

home.title: National Team
home.subtitle: Every match, every set, every appearance of the Estonia Men's National Volleyball Team, preserved and searchable.
home.tipText: ALL vs AM: Matches with additional training sets are stored in two versions. Filter by AM to see only official international results.

matches.title: Matches
matches.subtitle: Every recorded match of the Estonia Men's National Volleyball Team.

players.title: Players
players.subtitle: All players who have represented the Estonia Men's National Volleyball Team since 1992.

coaches.title: Coaches
coaches.subtitle: Head coaches of the Estonia Men's National Volleyball Team since 1992.
coaches.name: Name
